ApiKeyCreateOut.description:
Response body for ``POST /admin/api-keys``.

``plaintext`` is populated only on creation and is the full bearer
token (``gv_sk_<prefix>_<body>``). Callers must save it immediately.
ApiKeyCreateOut.title: ApiKeyCreateOut

correlation_id.description: X-Correlation-ID echoed back so logs can be joined.
correlation_id.title: Correlation Id

details.description: Per-field detail, present for validation_error and friends.
details.title: Details

ErrorDetail.description: Structured detail for multi-error responses (e.g. validation failures).

path.description: Dotted path to the offending field.
path.title: Path

ErrorDetail.title: ErrorDetail

ErrorEnvelope.description: Outer envelope — every 4xx / 5xx response body conforms to this model.
ErrorEnvelope.title: ErrorEnvelope

SelfApiTokenCreateOut.description: Creation response — ``plaintext`` is revealed exactly once.
SelfApiTokenCreateOut.title: SelfApiTokenCreateOut

WebhookCreateOut.description: Includes the plaintext HMAC secret (shown once).
WebhookCreateOut.title: WebhookCreateOut

get.description:
Tail of the audit_log surfaced as structured log lines.

The real CloudWatch Logs integration lands in Phase 12 — this surface
keeps the dashboard interactive in local + CI today.

delete.description:
Soft-delete: flip `disabled=true`. We never hard-delete users
so the audit_log FK remains valid.
